name: Leases
description: A lease links a Client to a Facility with financial terms. siteId is denormalized from the facility for the site-scoped {where siteId in scope.siteIds} query (writer stamps siteId = facility.siteId on create). ALL financial fields are STAFF-only and must NEVER be added to a client-portal view/allowed list. Site-scoped staff management.

columns.name: createdAt
columns.description: Item created at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: updatedAt
columns.description: Item updated at. ISO 8601 datetime string, format: YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SS, e.g. 2025-09-30T18:45:00Z, 2025-09-30T18:45:00+05:30

columns.name: siteId
columns.description: Site (denormalized from facility) for site scope

columns.name: aggregateContractAmount
columns.description: Aggregate contract amount to date (USD, STAFF-only)

columns.name: moveInDate
